lab: shao le zi you zen neng hai kuo tian kong zhen shi zi zuo zi shou zi lian ban tu er fei ni bu hou hui yi yi yi yi wu fan gu duan le tui lu hai tan shen me xing fu ni you he ku
lab_without_tone: shao le zi you zen neng hai kuo tian kong zhen shi zi zuo zi shou zi lian ban tu er fei ni bu hou hui yi yi yi yi wu fan gu duan le tui lu hai tan shen me xing fu ni you he ku
raw_text:
少了自由怎能海阔天空
真是自作自受自怜
半途而废
你不后悔
义义义义无反顾断了退路
还谈什么幸福
你又何苦
